posts.author: Marina (Marina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, community.
I want digitally sign the docs inside Monday.com.
History:
I connected gmail account to monday.com. Now all the emails I need to sign go automatically to Monday.com. I want to sign them there, and then to send it some where else.

I have ADOBE ACROBAT PRO account, but can I connect adobe with Monday.com?
If not, which tool will help me to sign the document in monday.com. I tried many other apps, but I feel they are good in terms of sending the documents for signatures, not signing.

Thanks for any help.
Marina

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Marina,

At this time, natively signing docs isn’t currently supported however I will be sure to share this feedback internally with our team.

As for apps, based on feedback I’ve heard internally and externally, docusign + getsign are apps that allow you to sign documents. I hope this helps in some way!

posts.author: ExperSigner (Adrian)
posts.cookedHtml: If you’re looking for a more affordable alternative to DocuSign, you might consider options like QuickSigner. These platforms often offer competitive pricing with similar features for electronic signature services. Make sure to compare their pricing plans and features to find the best fit for your needs!
